name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America in Westerville, OH at 82 E Schrock Rd provides payday and title loans with fast approval.
description_long:
Advance America's location in Westerville, OH is situated at 82 E Schrock Rd, providing a dedicated storefront for the area. This standalone branch keeps extended weekday hours—Monday through Thursday 10 AM to 6 PM, Friday 9 AM to 6 PM—and closes on weekends.

At this Westerville branch, Advance America offers payday loans, title loans, and short-term lending for customers with urgent cash needs. Call 614-523-3649 to discuss options, application details, or schedule an appointment with a loan specialist.

Westerville residents seeking immediate funds without traditional banking delays will find a straightforward path at this Advance America location. Bring valid government-issued ID and recent income verification when you apply—standard documentation needed to complete the lending process.
pros: 4.9/5 star rating based on 125,388 verified customer reviews
Over 200,000 Google reviews — unusually high volume for a lending chain
Bilingual staff — Spanish-language service available in-store
Three distinct loan products covering $100 to $25,000 depending on collateral
Online and phone pre-qualification available before visiting the store
Western Union money transfers offered alongside loan products
Clear upfront disclosure of required documents (ID, income proof, checking account, SSN/ITIN)
cons: No APR or fee information disclosed on the store location page — rate transparency is poor
Payday loans cap at $500 and carry typical triple-digit APR costs standard to the product type
Title loans require a fully paid-off vehicle with title in borrower's name — narrows eligibility
Store is closed Sundays, limiting access for borrowers with weekend-only availability
Title loans are administered through a third-party partner (LoanCenter), not directly by Advance America
best_for: Borrowers needing up to $500 fast with a steady paycheck and no bank credit access
Spanish-speaking consumers who prefer bilingual in-person loan assistance
Vehicle owners with a free-and-clear title needing $2,000–$25,000 quickly
Consumers who need more than a payday loan and can manage installment repayments up to $1,000
diagnosis: Advance America is best for borrowers who need $100–$1,000 fast, have a verifiable income source, and cannot qualify for bank credit or a credit union loan — particularly Spanish-speaking customers who value bilingual in-person service. The main caveat is cost transparency: the store page discloses no rate information, and payday loans in particular carry high effective APRs that make them expensive if not repaid within the initial term.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.

meta_description: Westerville, OH Advance America at 82 E Schrock Rd provides fast payday and title loans locally.
